about.label: // About me
about.title: Bridging Human Logic and Artificial Intelligence.
about.bio1: I'm Josué, a software engineer with over 5 years building real systems for real businesses. I've worked on computer vision projects, built AI chatbots for document consultation, and architected web platforms that keep running when they're needed most.
about.bio2: Today I work independently because I believe well-applied technology transforms businesses. I don't sell projects — I build solutions that keep generating value long after I've stepped away.

services.label: // THE PROBLEM I SOLVE
services.title: Your business is losing money every time technology doesn't work for you.
services.cta_question: Do any of these problems sound familiar?

fullstack.title: Your website doesn't convert because it was built to look good, not to sell
fullstack.desc: I build web applications and systems that do the real work: attract clients, manage processes, and scale without breaking. No technical debt, no excuses.

ai.title: Your team loses hours answering questions an AI could solve in seconds
ai.desc: I integrate AI into your processes: chatbots that know your business, systems that read and summarise documents, and agents that automate repetitive tasks. Result: your team does what only humans can do.

vision.title: Your AI models don't learn because nobody is training them properly
vision.desc: I've worked on real computer vision projects for large companies: model training, data labelling and maintaining systems in production. I know what it takes to make a model work in the real world, not just in a notebook.

backend.title: Your platform holds up fine — until suddenly it doesn't
backend.desc: Architectures that scale when the business grows, not ones that crash when you need them most. Clean APIs, automated deployments and systems that don't wake you up at 3 AM.

icloud.highlight: Led the development of two innovative projects: an AI Chatbot (LLM) for compliance standard consultation and a Document Manager with defined roles and permissions.

siali.highlight: Developed computer vision systems with real-time camera processing for Mercadona and GSK. Responsible for AI training for detection and segmentation, and intuitive web interfaces.

viacore.highlight: Integrated ReactJS with TypeScript and Material UI to build interactive dashboards for healthcare professionals, and a patient monitoring system using Express.js.

funiber.highlight: Designed end-to-end architecture (business logic, data models, APIs), managed MySQL databases, and implemented Docker-based deployment with PHP/Laravel.
